# core_object

Shared app-neutral object identity and transform contract for scene interchange.

## Scope (bootstrap)
- Canonical object identity/type fields
- Dimensional mode (`plane_locked` / `full_3d`) and plane lock policy
- Transform + visibility/lock/select flags
- Deterministic object validation and constraint enforcement helpers

## Dependencies
- `core_base`

## Status
- Bootstrap implementation with unit tests.
